strategy_description: ATM VEV_5000+VEV_5100 bundle vs single Black-Scholes sigma (RV from extract log returns annualized); coordinated legs with extract delta hedge; tight-spread hydrogel fade. TTE from round3description: historical day d -> 8-d days (via _prosperity4bt_hist_day in backtest).
Same ATM bundle thesis; fair from per-leg implied vol (bisection on mids) plus IV-vs-RV shock overlay; MISPRICE_EDGE=2.5, RV_WINDOW=50 grid corner vs v0.
